title: Support - App, user not logged ever, login, dialog, Cancel
scenario: Guest user navigates to Support, clicks App button, then Login, and verifies Cancel returns to Later/Login dialog
steps: Go through onboarding as a Guest
Navigate to Support via the hamburger menu
Click Cancel on the login dialog
expected: A login dialog with Cancel/Continue buttons should appear. After clicking Cancel, the user should be returned to the Later/Login dialog.
